metadata.description: Go to We Work Remotely (https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/new) and complete the 4-step job posting form to post a remote job listing. Fill in all required fields across all steps and place the order.

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account
common_info.user_info: alex_green_personal_info.json; the dummy user's personal information
common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected

instruction: Go to We Work Remotely (https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/new) and complete the 4-step job posting form to post a remote job listing. Fill in all required fields across all steps and place the order.
